calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Off Calendar

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Lorentzen Co.
Off Calendar Jun-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Irene Tofft, CSR#12913.

Michael E. Fox, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, JAMES BRADFORD, JR.,
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant LORENTZEN CO.,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiff shall recover damages from defendant LORENTZEN CO., INC., in the amount of:

For Plaintiff, JAMES BRADFORD, JR. $75,750.00 in Economic Damages,
For Plaintiff, JAMES BRADFORD, JR. $750,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages,
Total Judgment of $825,750.00.

The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
